results.rendered_html:
prasita p. p.
1 Bound, fastened.
2 Devoted to, engaged in, occupied with.
3 Intent on, longing for, craving after (with instr. or loc.); lakṣmyā lakṣmyāṃ vā prasitaḥ Sk;.  R. 8. 23. 
4 Very clear.
— taṃ Pus, matter.
